commit.message:
Gardener prompt v3: already turned around, facing the galaxy

Replaces the Annie Dillard companion frame with a new orientation:
the Gardener is not walking beside the person, already facing them —
the Gardener is already turned around, facing the galaxy, and the
person's word simply orients where in the galaxy to begin showing.

Key shifts:
- Core posture: from companion/witness to someone already looking
  in the right direction before the person arrives
- The user's word orients looking, it does not become the subject
- Six-point constitution adds: earn the right to point (showing
  must accumulate before pointing), and know when the walk is
  complete by whether it has arrived somewhere, not by turn count
- Season descriptions reframed as constellations of distance —
  winter_1 shows something small and true, summer_1 shows two
  constellations out, fall_2 leaves the direction present without
  summarizing it
- dormant reduced to three words: "Shall we continue?"
- WHAT YOU NEVER DO adds: never turn to look at the user when
  you should be looking at the galaxy; never use their word as
  data to process — use it as a place to begin looking

commit.message:
MoriaCppMod v2.7.3 — Unified build dispatch, ghost piece awareness, snap grey-out

- Two-file architectural split: moria_placement.inl (build lifecycle, snap, ghost)
  and moria_quickbuild.inl (F-key dispatch, recipe slots, icons)
- Unified build-from-target through quickbuild dispatch (single SM, m_isTargetBuild flag)
- Eliminated duplicate TB state machine (~130 lines)
- Ghost piece awareness: MC slot 5 greyed out when no ghost active, enabled on ghost appear
- Event-driven ghost detection via OnAfterShow/OnAfterHide ProcessEvent hooks
- Snap persistence across recipe switches via onGhostAppeared() re-application
- Suppress transient ghost disappear during rapid F-key switching (RHI crash fix)
- No-op guard in setMcSlotState prevents redundant Slate mutations

docs: atualizar CHECKLIST com Fase 2 completa

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Optimize replay IO and hot-path allocation patterns (#4)

* Fix 19 validated code review findings across all crates

Address critical, high, and medium severity issues identified during
code review, improving data safety, input validation, observability,
and component lifecycle management.

Key changes:
- Prevent data loss in storage sinks by deferring buffer.clear() until
  after writes succeed (pb-store)
- Validate NaN/negative/infinity in FixedPrice and FixedSize from_f64
  (pb-types, breaking: FixedSize::from_f64 now returns Result)
- Fix cross-hour parquet partitioning by grouping events by (asset_id, hour)
- Stop WS client on receiver drop instead of reconnecting forever (pb-feed)
- Make WS/REST clients configurable via WsConfig/RestConfig structs
- Classify HTTP 429 as RateLimited, other non-2xx as HttpStatus (pb-feed)
- Per-asset sequence counters in dispatcher for gap detection (pb-feed)
- Re-enable check_sequence() in replay engine with per-asset sequences
- Fix ClickHouse reader for nullable side column, sort by (timestamp, seq)
- Wire metrics recording into all runtime paths (ws, dispatcher, sinks)
- Fix metrics registration order: install recorder before register_metrics()
- Wire --duration-mins CLI arg, logging config, and feed config
- Log fan-out send failures instead of silently dropping with let _ =
- Skip invalid sizes in backfill with warning instead of coercing to zero

Tests: 61 pass (was 29), including 3 new dispatcher integration tests
and 6 new edge-case unit tests for fixed-point validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Box FeedError::Ws variant to fix clippy result_large_err

The tungstenite::Error is 136 bytes, making FeedError too large for
Result returns. Box it and add a manual From impl to preserve ergonomic
? operator usage.

commit.message:
fix(subwhisper): v8.20 — toast persistant ops longues + délai ping API démarrage

- toastPersist(msg) : toast qui reste visible jusqu'à toastClear() — pour cleanAI()
- toastClear() : efface le toast persistant
- cleanAI() : utilise toastPersist + affiche progression sur bouton (✨ IA 1/3)
- pingAllApis() au démarrage : délai 1.5s pour éviter faux négatifs réseau lent
- Timeout pings : 5000ms → 10000ms pour réseau mobile/lent

tagging 7 tools as core (always loaded) and 22 as extended (discoverable

browser_fill, browser_screenshot, health_check

commit.message:
fix: チームライド設計思想修正 — 全員が使えるアプリに

問題:
- admin_pin が平文("1234")でSHA-256比較が永遠に失敗→誰もadmin不可
- イベント作成・配車確定・LINE共有・メンバー追加が全て管理者限定
- 「車持ち」という意味不明なラベル

修正:
- Firebase admin_pin をSHA-256ハッシュ値に修正
- イベント作成/編集/配車実行/確定/LINE共有を全員開放
- メンバー追加/大会記録を全員開放
- 管理者限定は設定(PIN変更/チーム名変更)のみに
- 「車持ち」→「車出し可」に修正
- ボトムナビ順序: ホーム→メンバー→大会→設定

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove AI from import, improve chapter heuristics, limit chat history to 5 exchanges

- ImportModal: use local heuristic chapter detection only, remove Gemini AI call
- detectChapters(): enhanced patterns (ordinals, subtitles, structural keywords,
  all-caps isolation, title/subtitle merging, lower fallback threshold)
- askAboutDocument(): sliding window of 5 last exchanges to reduce token usage
- Remove API key warning from import modal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(C4): consent archival cron + composite index + vercel.json

Add @@index([websiteId, consentedAt]) to Consent table for efficient
archival deletes and date-range exports. Applied to Supabase via db push.

New daily cron at 03:00 UTC deletes consent records beyond each user's
plan retention period (Free: 7d, Starter: 30d, Pro: 90d, Enterprise:
365d). Bearer-token auth matches the existing account-deletions cron.

Created vercel.json scheduling both cron jobs.

Also fix C3's directUrl: Prisma 7 removed datasource url/directUrl from
schema.prisma — moved to prisma.config.ts with conditional spread so
DIRECT_URL remains optional for local dev.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(sprint-07): fix dashboard data display + add search/filter to all tabs

- Fix bugs/features not loading: remove auto-sprint-defaulting in neon.ts
  storage layer so empty sprint returns all data instead of only current sprint
- Fix App.tsx sprint guard that blocked loading when "All sprints" selected
- Add "All sprints" default to SprintSelector in header
- Project sidebar click now navigates to Sessions tab for that project
- Add annotations to session API responses (summary count + detail array)
- Add annotations display in SessionDetail (stat card + section with kind badges)
- Add annotation count badge to SessionList cards
- Create reusable SearchInput component
- Add client-side search + status filter to BugList, FeatureList, SessionList, ProjectList
- Fix test mock: add annotations array to makeSession() fixture
